title: Human Mars Missions
shortSummary: Getting humans to Mars and back — mission architecture, transit habitation, surface operations, ISRU, and the engineering challenges of becoming multiplanetary.
whyItMatters: Mars is the ultimate destination for human spaceflight. SpaceX's entire company exists to make humanity multiplanetary. The engineering challenges — 6-month transit, Mars EDL, surface operations, propellant production, and return — represent the hardest problems in aerospace engineering.
coreConcepts: Mars mission architecture (conjunction vs opposition class)
Transit vehicle design and crew health
Earth return vehicle and abort scenarios
